chat.userQuestion: What is the penalty for theft in Morocco?
chat.aiResponse: According to the Moroccan Penal Code (Articles 505-534), simple theft is punishable by imprisonment from 1 to 5 years. If there is breaking or violence, the penalty can reach 10-20 years...

testimonials.title: Trusted by
testimonials.t1Text: I got my answer about divorce procedures in less than 10 seconds. This would have taken days with a lawyer.
testimonials.t2Text: As a startup founder, 9anon AI helped me understand SARL registration requirements without any consultation fees.
testimonials.t3Text: The inheritance calculator saved me from a costly mistake. The AI even cited the exact Moudawana articles.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, 9anon AI is completely free to use. No credit card, no hidden fees, no registration required. Our mission is to make Moroccan legal knowledge accessible to everyone.
faq.q2: Can I trust the legal answers?
faq.a2: Every answer is backed by citations from official Moroccan legal sources — the Bulletin Officiel, Court of Cassation rulings, and specific Dahir articles. Our anti-hallucination pipeline verifies each response before delivery.
faq.a3: 9anon AI supports Arabic (العربية), French (Français), English, and Moroccan Darija (الدارجة). You can ask your question in any language and get a complete answer.
faq.a4: Absolutely. We do not store, log, or read your legal queries. Your conversations are processed in real-time and never persisted. Privacy is guaranteed by architecture, not just policy.
faq.a5: 9anon AI provides legal information, not legal advice. It's designed to help you understand your rights and the law. For complex cases that require representation, we recommend consulting a licensed attorney.

aboutUs.title: Democratizing
aboutUs.subtitle: We built 9anon AI because legal knowledge should not be a privilege — it is a fundamental right. Our mission is to make the entire corpus of Moroccan law instantly accessible, perfectly accurate, and completely free for every citizen, entrepreneur, and professional in Morocco.
aboutUs.storyOriginP1: 9anon AI was born out of a deeply personal frustration. Our founders — Moroccan engineers and legal researchers — watched friends, family members, and small business owners struggle to access basic legal information. Hiring a lawyer for a simple question about the Moudawana or the Code du Travail was either unaffordable or impractical. Online forums were flooded with outdated or outright wrong advice.
aboutUs.storyOriginP2: We asked ourselves: what if the entire body of Moroccan law — every Dahir, every decree, every ruling from the Cour de Cassation — could be distilled into an AI assistant that responds in Arabic, French, English, and Darija within seconds? That question became 9anon AI.
aboutUs.storyVisionP1: Our vision goes beyond technology. We believe that when citizens understand their rights, societies become stronger. 9anon AI is not just a chatbot — it is a legal empowerment platform designed specifically for the Moroccan legal framework, its unique procedural nuances, and its multilingual reality.
aboutUs.storyVisionP2: From divorce proceedings under the Moudawana to labor disputes governed by the Code du Travail, from inheritance calculations following Islamic jurisprudence to commercial registration under Moroccan company law — 9anon AI covers it all, with precision that general-purpose AI simply cannot match.
aboutUs.storyQuote: Legal knowledge should flow as freely as water. Morocco's 36 million citizens deserve instant access to their own laws.
aboutUs.philosophySubtitle: For decades, Moroccans have faced a stark choice: expensive consultations or unreliable forums. We built a third path.
aboutUs.philosophyOldDesc: Finding legal answers meant paying expensive consultation fees, waiting days for appointments, digging through dense Dahirs in classical Arabic, or trusting unreliable online forums with outdated information.
aboutUs.philosophyNewDesc: Instant, accurate legal intelligence — available 24/7. Powered by an AI engine trained exclusively on official Moroccan jurisprudence and validated against real case law.
aboutUs.painPoint1: Average consultation fee: 500-2000 MAD per session
aboutUs.painPoint2: Wait times of 3-7 days for a simple legal answer
aboutUs.painPoint3: 80% of online legal advice is outdated or incorrect
aboutUs.solutionPoint1: Completely free, unlimited legal queries — forever
aboutUs.solutionPoint2: Instant responses in under 1 second, available 24/7
aboutUs.solutionPoint3: Every answer backed by specific articles and court rulings
aboutUs.techDesc: General-purpose AI hallucinates legal citations. 9anon AI does not. Our proprietary Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture isolates Moroccan legal data from the general model, guaranteeing that every response is grounded in real, verifiable Moroccan law.
aboutUs.techFeature1Desc: We ingest every single article published in the Bulletin Officiel du Royaume du Maroc — the definitive source of Moroccan legislation, including Dahirs, decrees, and regulatory texts.
aboutUs.techFeature2Desc: Our knowledge base includes decades of jurisprudence from the Cour de Cassation (محكمة النقض), enabling 9anon AI to reference real precedent in its answers.
aboutUs.techFeature3Desc: We do not store, log, or read your legal queries. Your conversations are processed in real-time and never persisted. Your privacy is structurally guaranteed by architecture, not just policy.
aboutUs.techFeature4Desc: Our multi-layer verification pipeline cross-references every AI-generated response against indexed legal sources before delivery, flagging any claim that cannot be traced to a specific Moroccan legal text.
aboutUs.valuesSubtitle: Six foundational principles guide every decision we make — from how we train our models to how we serve our users.
aboutUs.value1Desc: We never sacrifice precision for speed. Every response is verified against official Moroccan legal texts before being delivered to the user.
aboutUs.value2Desc: Your legal questions are sensitive. Our architecture is built so that no human — not even our team — can access your queries. Zero retention, zero exceptions.
aboutUs.value3Desc: Legal knowledge should be available in seconds, not days. We optimize every millisecond of our pipeline to deliver answers as fast as possible, on any device.
aboutUs.value4Desc: Basic access to Moroccan legal information will always be free. No credit card, no sign-up wall, no hidden fees. Legal literacy is a right, not a premium feature.
aboutUs.value5Desc: Morocco is multilingual — so is 9anon AI. We support Arabic (العربية), French (Français), English, and Moroccan Darija natively, not as an afterthought.
aboutUs.value6Desc: We don't localize a global product — we build specifically for Morocco. Our data, our models, and our team are rooted in Moroccan legal and cultural reality.
aboutUs.coverageSubtitle: 9anon AI covers the full breadth of Moroccan legislation — from family law to commercial disputes, from labor rights to digital regulation.
aboutUs.domain1Desc: Marriage, divorce, child custody, alimony, and all procedures under Morocco's Family Code (مدونة الأسرة). Including Khol', judicial divorce, and reconciliation procedures.
aboutUs.domain2Desc: Employment contracts, unfair dismissal, workplace accidents, social security (CNSS), and employee rights under the Moroccan Labor Code. Covers both private and public sector.
aboutUs.domain3Desc: Property transactions, rental agreements, tenant rights, eviction procedures, and land registration (Conservation Foncière). Including Dahir 67-12 on rental disputes.
aboutUs.domain4Desc: Company formation (SARL, SA, SAS), commercial registration, contract law, bankruptcy, and intellectual property. Covers startup legal requirements and tax obligations.
aboutUs.domain5Desc: Islamic inheritance calculations (فرض), estate planning, income tax (IR), corporate tax (IS), VAT, and fiscal compliance for individuals and businesses in Morocco.
aboutUs.domain6Desc: Criminal procedure, traffic violations, cybersecurity regulations (Law 05-20), data protection, cryptocurrency legal status, and immigration law under Moroccan jurisdiction.
aboutUs.ctaDescription: Join over 10,000 users who trust 9anon AI for instant, accurate guidance on Moroccan law. No sign-up required — start chatting for free right now.
